title: sambucus latipinna var. coreana
intro: Sambucus latipinna var. coreana, also known as the Korean elderberry, is a plant species within the Sambucus genus, specifically a variant of the Sambucus latipinna species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sambucus latipinna var. coreana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
